form.formComment: Continued winning form with another impressive display after running them ragged to make it two in a row at this track over 457m (25.53). With even luck looks hard to beat again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 5 length fourth (25.86) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at Q Straight. Looks a leading contender on best and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage third but before that won by a neck at this track (25.64) beating Boom Two Down in a OPEN on March 28. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last four starts. Last time out finished 2nd on April 4 over 457m at this track behind Hara's Oden beaten 3.5 lengths (25.62) in a OPEN. Not far away last time but this is a stiff test.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 4 lengths in 25.50, beating Thunderlash. Last start finished 4th in a OPEN on April 4 over 457m at this track behind Hara's Oden beaten 6 lengths (25.85). Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (25.57) at this track in a OPEN. Lines up from box 6 for the first time. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.
